title: AREA AGENCY ON AGING - 211info
text: DOUGLAS COUNTY SENIOR SERVICES AREA AGENCY ON AGING AREA AGENCY ON AGING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Area Agencies on Aging (AAA) provide a range of services to help older adults live safe, healthy, and independent lives. 1036 SE Douglas Avenue Room 221 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Age 60 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 440-3677 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 440-3677 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Area Agencies on Aging Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS FOOD - SENIOR CENTER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGLAS COUNTY SENIOR SERVICES AREA AGENCY ON AGING
